title: Register a new account successfully
description: Verifies a user can open the registration form, submit valid details, and see a success confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the sign up action in the navigation bar
Fill Test User into the name field
Fill testuser_unique into the username field
Fill testuser_unique@example.com into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit the registration form
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Registration shows validation error for invalid email
description: Verifies the registration form prevents submission with an invalid email and shows an error state.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the sign up action in the navigation bar
Fill Test User into the name field
Fill testuser_invalid_email into the username field
Fill invalid-email into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit the registration form
Verify an email validation error is visible

title: Registration blocks submission when required fields are missing
description: Verifies required-field validation appears when attempting to register with missing required inputs.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the sign up action in the navigation bar
Fill Test User into the name field
Fill testuser_missing_fields into the username field
Submit the registration form
Verify required field validation errors are visible

title: Registration allows toggling between sign up and sign in views
description: Verifies the user can switch between registration and login views from the auth entry points without leaving the page flow.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the sign up action in the navigation bar
Click the action to switch to sign in
Verify the login form is displayed

title: Login successfully with email and password
description: Verifies a user can log in with valid credentials and sees the navbar update to the signed-in state.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the sign in action in the navigation bar
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the navigation bar shows a signed-in user state

title: Login shows authentication error with incorrect password
description: Verifies incorrect credentials do not log the user in and an authentication error is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the sign in action in the navigation bar
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill wrong-password into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify an authentication error message is visible

title: Login form blocks submission when fields are empty
description: Verifies client-side validation triggers when attempting to submit the login form without required fields.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the sign in action in the navigation bar
Submit the login form
Verify required field validation errors are visible

title: PC Build page loads primary component selection and scores
description: Verifies the build page loads and shows the primary UI for selecting components and viewing benchmark scores.

steps.description: Navigate to /build
Verify component categories are displayed
Verify benchmark scores are displayed

title: Select a component and see totals and scores update
description: Verifies selecting a component updates the build totals and benchmark scores based on the selection.

steps.description: Navigate to /build
Click a component category
Select a component from the list
Verify the total price reflects the selected component
Verify benchmark scores update after the selection

title: Attempt to save build without name shows validation error
description: Verifies the build cannot be saved without a name and shows a validation error state for the missing name.

steps.description: Navigate to /build
Click a component category
Select a component from the list
Submit the save build action
Verify a build name validation error is visible

title: Complete Build Wizard flow to recommended preset and start customization
description: Verifies the wizard can collect usage and budget inputs, show a recommended preset, and transition into customization on the Build page.

steps.description: Navigate to /plan
Select a usage type
Select a budget tier
Wait for the recommended preset results to load
Click the option to customize the recommended build
Verify the user lands on the Build page

title: Change Build Wizard selections using back navigation
description: Verifies the user can go back in the wizard, change selections, and see updated recommended results.

steps.description: Navigate to /plan
Select a usage type
Select a budget tier
Wait for the recommended preset results to load
Click the back button to change selections
Select a different budget tier
Wait for the recommended preset results to load
Verify recommended preset build details are displayed

title: Recommended preset displays component details and reasons
description: Verifies the wizard shows a recommended preset with component details and rationale after selections are made.

steps.description: Navigate to /plan
Select a usage type
Select a budget tier
Wait for the recommended preset results to load
Verify recommended component details are displayed
Verify recommendation reasons are displayed

title: Build Wizard handles no matching preset with an empty state
description: Verifies the wizard can show a no-results state when a selection combination yields no preset, without requiring environment setup.

steps.description: Navigate to /plan
Select a usage type
Select a budget tier
Wait for the recommended preset results to load
Click the back button to change selections
Select a different usage type
Select a different budget tier
Wait for the recommended preset results to load
Verify either recommended preset build details are displayed or an empty state message is visible

title: Build Wizard results remain usable when switching choices repeatedly
description: Verifies the wizard remains stable when the user changes selections multiple times and still can reach a valid results state.

steps.description: Navigate to /plan
Select a usage type
Select a budget tier
Wait for the recommended preset results to load
Click the back button to change selections
Select a different usage type
Select a different budget tier
Wait for the recommended preset results to load
Click the option to customize the recommended build
Verify the user lands on the Build page

title: Report a forum post with a selected reason
description: Verifies an authenticated user can submit a report for a forum post when a reason is selected.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /forum
Open a forum post
Initiate the report flow for the post
Select a valid reason from the reason dropdown
Fill a short description into the description field
Submit the report
Verify a report submission confirmation is visible

title: Report a forum comment with a selected reason
description: Verifies an authenticated user can submit a report for a forum comment when a reason is selected.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /forum
Open a forum post that has comments visible
Initiate the report flow for a comment
Select a valid reason from the reason dropdown
Submit the report
Verify a report submission confirmation is visible

title: Report validation: submit without selecting a reason
description: Verifies the report form prevents submission when no reason is selected and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /forum
Open a forum post
Initiate the report flow for the post or a comment
Submit the report
Verify a reason-required validation error is visible

title: Report form allows optional description to be left blank
description: Verifies a report can be submitted with a selected reason even when the optional description is empty.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /forum
Open a forum post
Initiate the report flow for the post
Select a valid reason from the reason dropdown
Ensure the description field is empty
Submit the report
Verify a report submission confirmation is visible

title: Cancel/close report flow without submitting
description: Verifies the user can dismiss the report UI without creating a report submission confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /forum
Open a forum post
Initiate the report flow for the post or a comment
Close the report flow
Verify the report form is no longer visible

title: Notification dropdown opens from homepage navbar
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open the notifications dropdown and see notifications or an empty state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /
Open the notification dropdown from the navbar
Verify notifications are displayed or an empty state is visible

title: Navigate to a notification target by clicking a notification
description: Verifies clicking a notification navigates the user to the notification target page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /
Open the notification dropdown from the navbar
Click a notification item
Verify the user lands on a relevant target page for the notification

title: Mark a notification as read from the dropdown
description: Verifies an unread notification can be marked as read and the UI reflects the change.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /
Open the notification dropdown from the navbar
Mark a notification as read
Verify the notification is shown as read in the dropdown

title: Notification badge unread count changes after marking read
description: Verifies the unread count indicator updates after marking a notification as read.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /
Open the notification dropdown from the navbar
Mark a notification as read
Close the notification dropdown
Verify the unread notification badge count decreases or disappears

title: Notification dropdown displays an empty state when there are no notifications
description: Verifies the notifications UI handles an account with no notifications by showing an empty state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /
Open the notification dropdown from the navbar
Verify an empty state is visible if no notifications are available

title: Profile page loads saved builds and account settings for authenticated user
description: Verifies an authenticated user can access the profile page and see saved builds and account settings sections.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /profile
Verify saved builds are displayed or an empty state is visible
Verify account settings are displayed

title: Edit a saved build and persist changes
description: Verifies a user can open a saved build from the profile, edit it, save changes, and see the updated value persist.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /profile
Open a saved build from the saved builds list
Edit the build name to Build Alpha 01
Save the build changes
Navigate to /profile
Verify the saved builds list contains Build Alpha 01

title: Unauthenticated access to profile is blocked
description: Verifies attempting to access the protected profile page while unauthenticated results in an authentication prompt or access denied UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /profile
Verify an authentication prompt or access denied message is visible

title: Reset password with valid token updates password
description: Verifies a user can submit a valid reset token and new password and see a success confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /reset-password
Fill a valid reset token into the reset token field
Fill a valid new password into the new password field
Fill the same valid new password into the confirm password field
Submit the password reset form
Verify a success confirmation is visible indicating the password was updated

title: Reset password rejects invalid or expired token
description: Verifies submitting an invalid or expired token shows an error and does not complete the reset.

steps.description: Navigate to /reset-password
Fill an invalid reset token into the reset token field
Fill a valid new password into the new password field
Fill the same valid new password into the confirm password field
Submit the password reset form
Verify a token invalid or expired error is visible

title: Reset password prevents submit when passwords do not match
description: Verifies the form blocks submission when the new password and confirmation do not match.

steps.description: Navigate to /reset-password
Fill a valid reset token into the reset token field
Fill a valid new password into the new password field
Fill a different valid password into the confirm password field
Submit the password reset form
Verify a password mismatch validation error is visible

title: Reset password requires new password before submission
description: Verifies required-field validation prevents resetting when the new password is missing.

steps.description: Navigate to /reset-password
Fill a valid reset token into the reset token field
Leave the new password field empty
Submit the password reset form
Verify a required field validation error is visible

title: Reset password requires token before submission
description: Verifies required-field validation prevents resetting when the reset token is missing.

steps.description: Navigate to /reset-password
Leave the reset token field empty
Fill a valid new password into the new password field
Fill the same valid new password into the confirm password field
Submit the password reset form
Verify a required field validation error is visible

title: Reset password enforces basic password validity
description: Verifies the form shows a validation error for an obviously invalid new password.

steps.description: Navigate to /reset-password
Fill a valid reset token into the reset token field
Fill an invalid new password into the new password field
Fill the same invalid new password into the confirm password field
Submit the password reset form
Verify a password validation error is visible

title: Admin dashboard loads core stats, chart, and reports
description: Verifies an administrator can access the admin dashboard and see key overview content.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin
Verify total users, components, posts, and builds counts are displayed
Verify an activity chart and latest reports are displayed

title: Admin dashboard sidebar navigates to another admin page
description: Verifies admin can use the sidebar navigation from the dashboard to reach another admin area.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin
Click the sidebar link to the inventory management page
Verify the admin inventory management page is displayed

title: Admin dashboard denies access when not authenticated
description: Verifies an unauthenticated user attempting to access the admin dashboard is blocked or redirected to sign-in.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin
Verify the user is redirected to sign-in or shown a permission error

title: Admin inventory loads and allows filtering by component type
description: Verifies the inventory page displays a list of components and filtering updates the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/inventory
Select a component type filter
Verify a list of components matching the selected type is displayed

title: Admin inventory can create a new component and see it in the list
description: Verifies an administrator can add a component with required and type-specific fields and the new item appears in the inventory list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/inventory
Open the add component form
Select a component type that enables type-specific fields
Fill "UI Test Component 001" into the component name field
Fill "TestBrand" into the brand field
Fill a valid price into the price field
Fill required type-specific fields with valid values
Submit the create component form
Verify "UI Test Component 001" appears in the components list

title: Admin inventory shows dynamic fields when component type changes
description: Verifies the form updates to show different required spec fields based on the selected component type.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/inventory
Open the add component form
Select CPU as the component type
Verify CPU-specific spec fields are displayed
Select GPU as the component type
Verify GPU-specific spec fields are displayed

title: Admin inventory prevents creating a component with missing required fields
description: Verifies validation errors appear and saving is prevented when required fields are not provided.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/inventory
Open the add component form
Select a component type
Leave required fields empty
Submit the create component form
Verify validation errors are visible and the component is not saved

title: Admin inventory can edit an existing component and see updated value
description: Verifies an administrator can edit a component and the updated name is reflected in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/inventory
Open the add component form
Select a component type
Fill "UI Test Component To Edit" into the component name field
Fill "TestBrand" into the brand field
Fill a valid price into the price field
Fill required type-specific fields with valid values
Submit the create component form
Open the edit form for "UI Test Component To Edit"
Fill "UI Test Component Edited" into the component name field
Submit the save changes action
Verify "UI Test Component Edited" appears in the components list

title: Admin inventory can delete a component and it no longer appears
description: Verifies an administrator can delete a component and it is removed from the inventory list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/inventory
Open the add component form
Select a component type
Fill "UI Test Component To Delete" into the component name field
Fill "TestBrand" into the brand field
Fill a valid price into the price field
Fill required type-specific fields with valid values
Submit the create component form
Delete "UI Test Component To Delete" from the components list
Verify "UI Test Component To Delete" is not present in the components list

title: Create and activate a new preset build
description: Administrator can create a new preset with usage, budget, components, and reasons, and see it appear as active in the presets list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/presets
Open the add preset flow
Select a usage type
Select a budget tier
Select a valid component from the components dropdown
Fill a reason for the selected component
Save the preset
Verify the new preset is listed in the presets list
Verify the new preset is shown as active

title: Prevent saving a preset without components
description: Administrator cannot save a preset when no components are selected, and a validation error is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/presets
Open the add preset flow
Select a usage type
Select a budget tier
Submit the preset form without selecting any components
Verify a validation error is visible
Verify the preset is not added to the presets list

title: View presets list and basic details
description: Administrator can load the presets page and see existing presets displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/presets
Verify the presets list is displayed
Verify preset usage and budget information is displayed for at least one preset

title: Toggle a preset active/inactive
description: Administrator can toggle a preset's active state and see the state change reflected in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/presets
Toggle the active state for the first preset in the list
Verify the preset active status indicator changes state

title: Edit an existing preset's component reason and save
description: Administrator can edit a preset by updating a component reason and see the change persist in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/presets
Open the edit flow for the first preset in the list
Update the reason text for an existing component to "Updated reason for testing"
Save the preset
Verify the updated reason text "Updated reason for testing" is displayed for that preset

title: Delete a preset from the list
description: Administrator can delete an existing preset and see it removed from the presets list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/presets
Open the add preset flow
Select a usage type
Select a budget tier
Select a valid component from the components dropdown
Fill a reason for the selected component
Save the preset
Delete the newly created preset
Verify the deleted preset is no longer listed in the presets list

title: Auto-calculations update when selecting components
description: Selecting components auto-fills component details and updates total price calculation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/presets
Open the add preset flow
Select a usage type
Select a budget tier
Select a valid component from the components dropdown
Select an additional valid component from the components dropdown
Verify the total price is displayed and updates after component selection
